QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_17

question.text: In the SEBI vs Hemant Ghai case (CNBC Awaaz 'Stock 20-20' show), what was the amount of proceeds earned through the trades examined?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Case 8.4, trades were executed in violation of SEBI provisions and earned proceeds amounting to Rs. 2.95 crore through limited trades examined during the period. **The Trap:** The actual total profits may have been higher as only limited trades were examined. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Media personalities with advance knowledge of recommendations face the same regulatory scrutiny as any other market participant.
